command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 "sed -i '/    - Ollama:/,/        icon.*terminal.png/{/        icon.*terminal.png/a\    - MCP Services:
        href: http://192.168.0.201:3008
        description: SSH into vm-mcp-services
        icon: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/walkxcode/dashboard-icons/png/terminal.png}' ~/homepage/config/services.yaml && echo done"
